panels.title: A) step_push_update p50/p95 (ms)
panels.description: Primary slowdown detector. p50 shows typical cost, p95 shows tail risk. A rising p50 and p95 over run time means push_update work is drifting, not just sporadic spikes.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'p50' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY duration_ms)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name = 'step_push_update' AND ('${bot_id}' = '__all' OR bot_id = '${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = '__all' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'p95' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY duration_ms)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name = 'step_push_update' AND ('${bot_id}' = '__all' OR bot_id = '${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = '__all' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: B) Payload Growth Indicators
panels.description: Tracks what push_update is carrying: payload size and content counts. Use this to test whether latency growth follows larger payloads/candle history.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'payload_kb_p95' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ((NULLIF(context->>'payload_bytes', ''))::double precision / 1024.0))::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name = 'step_push_update' AND (context->>'payload_bytes') IS NOT NULL AND ('${bot_id}' = '__all' OR bot_id = '${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = '__all' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'candles_count_avg' AS metric, avg((NULLIF(context->>'candles_count', ''))::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name = 'step_push_update' AND (context->>'candles_count') IS NOT NULL AND ('${bot_id}' = '__all' OR bot_id = '${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = '__all' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'trades_count_avg' AS metric, avg((NULLIF(context->>'trades_count', ''))::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name = 'step_push_update' AND (context->>'trades_count') IS NOT NULL AND ('${bot_id}' = '__all' OR bot_id = '${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = '__all' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'series_count_avg' AS metric, avg((NULLIF(context->>'series_count', ''))::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name = 'step_push_update' AND (context->>'series_count') IS NOT NULL AND ('${bot_id}' = '__all' OR bot_id = '${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = '__all' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: C) build_state_ms p95
panels.description: Cost of building chart/runtime state before transport. Rising trend implies server-side state assembly work is growing with run progression.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CASE WHEN jsonb_typeof((context::jsonb)->'build_state_ms') = 'number' THEN (context->>'build_state_ms')::double precision WHEN (context->>'build_state_ms') ~ '^-?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?([eE][+-]?[0-9]+)?$' THEN (context->>'build_state_ms')::double precision END)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name = 'step_push_update' AND ('${bot_id}' = '__all' OR bot_id = '${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = '__all' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: D) serialize_ms p95
panels.description: Cost of turning push payload into transport format. If this rises with payload_kb, serialization is a major contributor to total push_update drift.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CASE WHEN jsonb_typeof((context::jsonb)->'serialize_ms') = 'number' THEN (context->>'serialize_ms')::double precision WHEN (context->>'serialize_ms') ~ '^-?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?([eE][+-]?[0-9]+)?$' THEN (context->>'serialize_ms')::double precision END)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name = 'step_push_update' AND ('${bot_id}' = '__all' OR bot_id = '${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = '__all' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: E) enqueue_ms p95
panels.description: Dispatch/fanout overhead after payload is prepared. Flat low values mean queue/send handoff is not the bottleneck; rising values indicate send-path pressure.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CASE WHEN jsonb_typeof((context::jsonb)->'enqueue_ms') = 'number' THEN (context->>'enqueue_ms')::double precision WHEN (context->>'enqueue_ms') ~ '^-?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?([eE][+-]?[0-9]+)?$' THEN (context->>'enqueue_ms')::double precision END)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name = 'step_push_update' AND ('${bot_id}' = '__all' OR bot_id = '${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = '__all' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: F) subscriber_count avg
panels.description: Average active subscribers during each interval. Use with latency panels to distinguish intrinsic payload cost from fanout/subscriber-driven behavior.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), avg(CASE WHEN jsonb_typeof((context::jsonb)->'subscriber_count') = 'number' THEN (context->>'subscriber_count')::double precision WHEN (context->>'subscriber_count') ~ '^-?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?([eE][+-]?[0-9]+)?$' THEN (context->>'subscriber_count')::double precision END)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name = 'step_push_update' AND ('${bot_id}' = '__all' OR bot_id = '${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = '__all' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: G) dropped_messages sum/avg
panels.description: Backpressure indicator. Non-zero dropped counts suggest downstream queue saturation and message shedding; near-zero suggests no delivery pressure.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'dropped_sum' AS metric, sum(CASE WHEN jsonb_typeof((context::jsonb)->'dropped_messages') = 'number' THEN (context->>'dropped_messages')::double precision WHEN (context->>'dropped_messages') ~ '^-?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?([eE][+-]?[0-9]+)?$' THEN (context->>'dropped_messages')::double precision END)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name = 'step_push_update' AND ('${bot_id}' = '__all' OR bot_id = '${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = '__all' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'dropped_avg' AS metric, avg(CASE WHEN jsonb_typeof((context::jsonb)->'dropped_messages') = 'number' THEN (context->>'dropped_messages')::double precision WHEN (context->>'dropped_messages') ~ '^-?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?([eE][+-]?[0-9]+)?$' THEN (context->>'dropped_messages')::double precision END)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name = 'step_push_update' AND ('${bot_id}' = '__all' OR bot_id = '${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = '__all' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: H) ms_per_kb_p95
panels.description: Normalization metric: latency per KB of payload. Rising values indicate worsening efficiency; flat/falling values indicate mostly a 'more bytes' effect.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CASE WHEN (context->>'payload_bytes') ~ '^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$' AND (context->>'payload_bytes')::double precision > 0 THEN duration_ms / ((context->>'payload_bytes')::double precision / 1024.0) END)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name = 'step_push_update' AND (context->>'payload_bytes') IS NOT NULL AND ('${bot_id}' = '__all' OR bot_id = '${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = '__all' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: I) Correlation Table (Selected Scope)
panels.description: Summary strength-of-relationship view for selected filters/time range. Correlation near +1 or -1 is strong linear linkage; near 0 suggests weak linear dependence.

targets.rawSql: WITH base AS ( SELECT duration_ms, CASE WHEN jsonb_typeof((context::jsonb)->'payload_bytes') = 'number' THEN (context->>'payload_bytes')::double precision WHEN (context->>'payload_bytes') ~ '^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?([eE][+-]?[0-9]+)?$' THEN (context->>'payload_bytes')::double precision END AS payload_bytes, CASE WHEN jsonb_typeof((context::jsonb)->'build_state_ms') = 'number' THEN (context->>'build_state_ms')::double precision WHEN (context->>'build_state_ms') ~ '^-?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?([eE][+-]?[0-9]+)?$' THEN (context->>'build_state_ms')::double precision END AS build_state_ms, CASE WHEN jsonb_typeof((context::jsonb)->'serialize_ms') = 'number' THEN (context->>'serialize_ms')::double precision WHEN (context->>'serialize_ms') ~ '^-?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?([eE][+-]?[0-9]+)?$' THEN (context->>'serialize_ms')::double precision END AS serialize_ms, CASE WHEN jsonb_typeof((context::jsonb)->'subscriber_count') = 'number' THEN (context->>'subscriber_count')::double precision WHEN (context->>'subscriber_count') ~ '^-?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?([eE][+-]?[0-9]+)?$' THEN (context->>'subscriber_count')::double precision END AS subscriber_count FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name = 'step_push_update' AND ('${bot_id}' = '__all' OR bot_id = '${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = '__all' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring}) ) SELECT count(*) AS samples, count(build_state_ms) AS build_state_samples, count(serialize_ms) AS serialize_samples, count(subscriber_count) AS subscriber_samples, corr(duration_ms, payload_bytes) AS corr_duration_payload_bytes, corr(duration_ms, build_state_ms) AS corr_duration_build_state_ms, corr(duration_ms, serialize_ms) AS corr_duration_serialize_ms, corr(duration_ms, subscriber_count) AS corr_duration_subscriber_count FROM base;

panels.title: J) Per-Bar Critical Path p95 (ms)
panels.description: Usefulness: High. Necessity: High. Top-level per-bar budget across dominant steps.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), step_name AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY duration_ms)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name IN ('step_series_state','step_finalize_bar','step_push_update','step_update_state') AND ('${bot_id}' = '__all' OR bot_id = '${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = '__all' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: K) New Per-Bar Stage Timers p95 (ms)
panels.description: Usefulness: High. Necessity: High. Reads new step_series_state context timers for precise hotspot attribution.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'candle_update_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'candle_update_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND context ? 'candle_update_ms' AND ('${bot_id}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring}='__all' OR run_id=${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'overlays_update_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'overlays_update_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND context ? 'overlays_update_ms' AND ('${bot_id}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring}='__all' OR run_id=${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'pending_signals_ops_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'pending_signals_ops_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND context ? 'pending_signals_ops_ms' AND ('${bot_id}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring}='__all' OR run_id=${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'execution_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'execution_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND context ? 'execution_ms' AND ('${bot_id}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring}='__all' OR run_id=${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'stats_update_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'stats_update_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND context ? 'stats_update_ms' AND ('${bot_id}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring}='__all' OR run_id=${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'persistence_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'persistence_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND context ? 'persistence_ms' AND ('${bot_id}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring}='__all' OR run_id=${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'delta_build_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'delta_build_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND context ? 'delta_build_ms' AND ('${bot_id}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring}='__all' OR run_id=${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'delta_serialize_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'delta_serialize_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND context ? 'delta_serialize_ms' AND ('${bot_id}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring}='__all' OR run_id=${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'stream_emit_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'stream_emit_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND context ? 'stream_emit_ms' AND ('${bot_id}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring}='__all' OR run_id=${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: L) Driver Counts (avg)
panels.description: Usefulness: Medium-High. Necessity: Medium. Correlate timer growth with operational counts.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'indicators_count_avg' AS metric, avg(NULLIF(context->>'indicators_count','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND context ? 'indicators_count' AND ('${bot_id}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring}='__all' OR run_id=${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'overlay_points_changed_avg' AS metric, avg(NULLIF(context->>'overlay_points_changed','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND context ? 'overlay_points_changed' AND ('${bot_id}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring}='__all' OR run_id=${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'signals_emitted_count_avg' AS metric, avg(NULLIF(context->>'signals_emitted_count','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND context ? 'signals_emitted_count' AND ('${bot_id}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring}='__all' OR run_id=${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'trades_touched_count_avg' AS metric, avg(NULLIF(context->>'trades_touched_count','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND context ? 'trades_touched_count' AND ('${bot_id}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring}='__all' OR run_id=${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'subscribers_count_avg' AS metric, avg(NULLIF(context->>'subscribers_count','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND context ? 'subscribers_count' AND ('${bot_id}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring}='__all' OR run_id=${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: M) Stats Reuse Health (Fix 1)
panels.description: Usefulness: High after fix rollout. Necessity: Medium. Confirms push path reused precomputed stats instead of rescanning every bar.

targets.rawSql: WITH base AS ( SELECT CASE WHEN lower(COALESCE(context->>'stats_reused','false')) IN ('true','t','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS reused, NULLIF(context->>'stats_update_ms','')::double precision AS stats_update_ms, duration_ms AS push_duration_ms FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_push_update' AND ('${bot_id}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring}='__all' OR run_id=${run_id:sqlstring}) ) SELECT count(*) AS samples, sum(reused) AS reused_samples, round(((sum(reused)::double precision / NULLIF(count(*),0)) * 100.0)::numeric, 2) AS reused_pct, round(avg(stats_update_ms)::numeric, 4) AS avg_stats_update_ms_in_push, round(percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY push_duration_ms)::numeric, 3) AS p95_push_ms FROM base;

panels.title: N) Execution Substage Breakdown p95 (ms)
panels.description: Break execution_ms into decision flow, bar/intrabar prime, settlement, and trade-event processing. Use this to isolate where step_series_state spends multi-second time.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'execution_decision_flow_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'execution_decision_flow_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND context ? 'execution_decision_flow_ms' AND ('${bot_id}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring}='__all' OR run_id=${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'execution_prime_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'execution_prime_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND context ? 'execution_prime_ms' AND ('${bot_id}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring}='__all' OR run_id=${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'execution_settlement_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'execution_settlement_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND context ? 'execution_settlement_ms' AND ('${bot_id}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring}='__all' OR run_id=${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'execution_trade_event_processing_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'execution_trade_event_processing_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND context ? 'execution_trade_event_processing_ms' AND ('${bot_id}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring}='__all' OR run_id=${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: O) Signal Eval Internals p95 (ms)
panels.description: Break step_signal_eval into strategy_eval_ms, indicator_eval_ms, and rule_eval_ms to verify whether indicator/rule evaluation dominates per-bar latency.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'step_signal_eval_duration_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY duration_ms)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_signal_eval' AND ('${bot_id}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring}='__all' OR run_id=${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'strategy_eval_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'strategy_eval_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_signal_eval' AND context ? 'strategy_eval_ms' AND ('${bot_id}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring}='__all' OR run_id=${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'indicator_eval_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'indicator_eval_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_signal_eval' AND context ? 'indicator_eval_ms' AND ('${bot_id}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring}='__all' OR run_id=${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'rule_eval_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'rule_eval_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_signal_eval' AND context ? 'rule_eval_ms' AND ('${bot_id}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring}='__all' OR run_id=${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: P) Trace/Persistence Overhead p95 (ms)
panels.description: Shows instrumentation/write overhead using trace step durations plus db_commit_ms/persistence_ms from step_series_state context.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), step_name AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY duration_ms)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name IN ('step_signal_eval','step_decision_flow','step_trade_event_processing','step_finalize_bar','step_update_state') AND ('${bot_id}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring}='__all' OR run_id=${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1,2 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'db_commit_ms_ctx' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'db_commit_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND context ? 'db_commit_ms' AND ('${bot_id}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring}='__all' OR run_id=${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'persistence_ms_ctx' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'persistence_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND context ? 'persistence_ms' AND ('${bot_id}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring}='__all' OR run_id=${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Q) Slowest Bars (Top 20)
panels.description: Top slow bars from step_series_state with substage timing context. Use this to inspect exact bar indexes and stage distribution for worst-case events.

targets.rawSql: SELECT started_at, run_id, bot_id, NULLIF(context->>'bar_index','')::int AS bar_index, duration_ms AS step_series_state_ms, NULLIF(context->>'candle_update_ms','')::double precision AS candle_update_ms, NULLIF(context->>'overlays_update_ms','')::double precision AS overlays_update_ms, NULLIF(context->>'pending_signals_ops_ms','')::double precision AS pending_signals_ops_ms, NULLIF(context->>'execution_ms','')::double precision AS execution_ms, NULLIF(context->>'execution_decision_flow_ms','')::double precision AS execution_decision_flow_ms, NULLIF(context->>'execution_prime_ms','')::double precision AS execution_prime_ms, NULLIF(context->>'execution_settlement_ms','')::double precision AS execution_settlement_ms, NULLIF(context->>'execution_trade_event_processing_ms','')::double precision AS execution_trade_event_processing_ms, NULLIF(context->>'stats_update_ms','')::double precision AS stats_update_ms, NULLIF(context->>'persistence_ms','')::double precision AS persistence_ms, NULLIF(context->>'db_commit_ms','')::double precision AS db_commit_ms, NULLIF(context->>'delta_build_ms','')::double precision AS delta_build_ms, NULLIF(context->>'delta_serialize_ms','')::double precision AS delta_serialize_ms, NULLIF(context->>'stream_emit_ms','')::double precision AS stream_emit_ms, NULLIF(context->>'overlay_points_changed','')::double precision AS overlay_points_changed, NULLIF(context->>'signals_emitted_count','')::double precision AS signals_emitted_count, NULLIF(context->>'trades_touched_count','')::double precision AS trades_touched_count FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND ('${bot_id}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring}='__all' OR run_id=${run_id:sqlstring}) ORDER BY duration_ms DESC LIMIT 20;

list.name: bot_id
list.label: Bot
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT bot_id AS __value, bot_id AS __text FROM portal_bot_runs WHERE bot_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1;

list.name: run_id
list.label: Run
list.query: SELECT run_id AS __value, run_id AS __text FROM portal_bot_runs WHERE ('${bot_id}' = '__all' OR bot_id = '${bot_id}') ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 500;

description: Use this dashboard to attribute per-bar slowdown during a bot run. Core push-update panels (A-I) isolate payload and transport costs. Critical-path panels (J-Q) add per-bar stage timing, signal/execution internals, trace overhead, and worst-bar inspection.
title: Quant-Trad: Bot Run Attribution
